description: PRD-31: Account deletion, missing tests, and mobile responsiveness fixes

userStories.title: Implement DELETE /api/auth/me endpoint with cascade delete
userStories.description: Add DELETE /api/auth/me endpoint that: (1) requires authentication via get_current_user dependency, (2) deletes all collections owned by the user — applications, calendar_events, contacts, and the user document itself — using asyncio.gather for parallel deletes, (3) clears auth cookies, (4) returns 204 No Content. Add delete_user service function in auth/service.py that accepts user_id and performs the cascade delete. Add tests: test_delete_account_success (verifies 204, cookies cleared, user not found after), test_delete_account_unauthenticated (verifies 401).
acceptanceCriteria: DELETE /api/auth/me returns 204 for authenticated user
All user applications are deleted from the applications collection
All user calendar_events are deleted
All user contacts are deleted
The user document is deleted from the users collection
Auth cookies are cleared in the response
Returns 401 when not authenticated
Uses asyncio.gather for parallel collection deletes
Tests test_delete_account_success and test_delete_account_unauthenticated pass

userStories.title: Wire delete account UI to call DELETE /api/auth/me
userStories.description: In SettingsAccountSection.jsx, wire the 'Delete my account' button (currently a no-op) to: (1) call a new deleteAccount API function (api/auth.js), (2) use a useDeleteAccount mutation hook (hooks/useAuth.js), (3) on success: clear auth context, redirect to landing page ('/'), show success toast. Add isPending spinner to the delete button. Add a useDeleteAccount hook that invalidates the auth query and calls logout after delete. The modal cancel button should remain functional.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking 'Delete my account' calls DELETE /api/auth/me
Button shows spinner while request is in flight
On success: user is logged out, redirected to '/', toast shown
On error: toast error message shown, modal stays open
Cancel button still closes modal without action
deleteAccount function added to api/auth.js
useDeleteAccount hook added to hooks/useAuth.js

userStories.title: Add Calendar page test file
userStories.description: Create frontend/src/pages/Calendar.test.jsx with tests covering: (1) renders loading skeleton when isLoading is true, (2) renders error message when error is present, (3) renders CalendarView when events data is loaded, (4) navigation to previous/next month works, (5) clicking an event opens the detail panel. Use MSW to mock GET /api/calendar/events. Follow the Arrange-Act-Assert pattern with describe/it('should ...') naming.
acceptanceCriteria: Calendar.test.jsx file created in frontend/src/pages/
At least 4 test cases covering loading, error, data, and navigation states
Uses MSW to mock API responses
All tests pass with npm test

userStories.title: Add Pricing page test file with accessibility checks
userStories.description: Create frontend/src/pages/Pricing.test.jsx with tests covering: (1) renders Free and Pro tier cards, (2) renders correct pricing amounts, (3) CTA buttons have accessible aria-labels, (4) feature list items are visible, (5) plan comparison table renders with correct data. Add aria-label to CTA buttons in Pricing.jsx if missing. Use describe/it('should ...') naming and Arrange-Act-Assert pattern.
acceptanceCriteria: Pricing.test.jsx file created in frontend/src/pages/
At least 4 test cases
CTA buttons in Pricing.jsx have aria-labels
All tests pass with npm test

userStories.title: Fix ContactForm mobile responsiveness
userStories.description: In ContactForm.jsx, the name/email row uses grid-cols-2 (line ~57) without a responsive breakpoint, causing a cramped two-column layout on narrow screens. Change it to 'grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 gap-4' so it stacks on mobile and side-by-side on tablet+. Also verify any other layout assumptions in the form are mobile-safe.
acceptanceCriteria: Name and email fields stack vertically on mobile (< 640px)
Name and email fields appear side-by-side on tablet+ (>= 640px)
No other layout regressions in ContactForm
npm run build succeeds
